projects.title: PROJECTS
projects.tagline: A collection of projects that showcase my passion for development and creative technology.

study-agents.title: StudyAgents
study-agents.subtitle: An intelligent educational system that helps students learn through AI agents. Upload PDFs, generate notes, ask questions, and take interactive tests with real-time feedback.

portfolio.title: Personal Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Interactive portfolio designed with Next.js and React to showcase my projects, skills and experience as a software engineer.

shooter.title: Realistic Online Videogame
shooter.subtitle: Online Multiplayer character-based shooter with realistic graphics and gameplay mechanics.

tire-inflator.title: Tire Inflator Simulator
tire-inflator.subtitle: Simulation of a tire inflation system built in Proteus, using C for microcontroller programming.

fiblab.title: FIB Lab
fiblab.subtitle: A simple 2D game made during the Unity Essential Course.

circusvr.title: Circus VR
circusvr.subtitle: Built a functional interactive VR system with circus props within 48 hours.

vr-experience.title: VR Experience
vr-experience.subtitle: Made a Virtual Reality experience to showcase the capabilities of the Metaverse.

drovo.title: DROVO
drovo.subtitle: Built a fun multiplayer prototype to play with friends.

salmon1.title: Online Videogame
salmon1.subtitle: My first contact with programming - an online multiplayer game.

3dprinting.title: 3D Printing
3dprinting.subtitle: Adapted and printed complex large-scale 3D models.

skills.title: SKILLS
skills.tagline: A comprehensive overview of my technical skills and proficiency levels.

c_cpp.name: C / C++
c_cpp.description: Used extensively in game development with Unreal Engine for multiplayer networking, gameplay systems, and performance-critical code. Also applied in microcontroller programming for the Tire Inflator Simulator project.

java.name: Java
java.description: Applied in university coursework for object-oriented programming, data structures, and software design patterns. Built desktop applications and backend systems.

python.name: Python
python.description: Core language for the StudyAgents AI platform — FastAPI backend, LangChain integrations, and data processing. Also used for scripting, automation, and ML/NLP experiments.

sql.name: SQL
sql.description: Database design and queries for web applications and backend systems. Used PostgreSQL and MySQL for relational data modeling, optimizations, and reporting.

r.name: R
r.description: Statistical analysis and data visualization in academic projects. Used for exploratory data analysis, regression models, and generating publication-ready plots.

html_css.name: HTML / CSS
html_css.description: Building responsive, accessible web interfaces. Used across portfolio, StudyAgents, and other projects with modern CSS (Flexbox, Grid, animations) and semantic HTML.

react_nextjs.name: React / Next.js
react_nextjs.description: Main stack for web development — this portfolio, StudyAgents frontend, and several personal projects. Experience with hooks, SSR, API routes, and component architecture.

tailwindcss.name: TailwindCSS
tailwindcss.description: Utility-first CSS for rapid UI development. Used in portfolio, StudyAgents, and other Next.js projects for consistent styling and responsive design.

nodejs.name: Node.js
nodejs.description: Server-side JavaScript for APIs and tooling. Used with FastAPI (Python) in StudyAgents for real-time features and with Next.js API routes.

postgresql.name: PostgreSQL
postgresql.description: Relational database for persistent storage in web applications. Schema design, migrations, and query optimization for user data and analytics.

mongodb.name: MongoDB
mongodb.description: Document-based storage for flexible data models. Used in projects requiring schema flexibility and quick iteration.

llm.name: LLM
llm.description: Large Language Models power the StudyAgents assistant — summarization, Q&A, and test generation. Integrated OpenAI and local models via LangChain.

rag.name: RAG
rag.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation in StudyAgents: ChromaDB vector store, document chunking, and semantic search to ground AI responses in uploaded PDFs.

nlp.name: NLP
nlp.description: Natural language processing for text extraction, summarization, and question-answering. Applied in StudyAgents and academic experiments.

neural_networks.name: Neural Networks
neural_networks.description: Understanding of architectures and training. Applied in course projects and for interpreting LLM behavior in StudyAgents.

exp.name: ExP
exp.description: Explanation-based learning concepts applied to making AI outputs interpretable and educational in the StudyAgents context.

autonomous_agents.name: Autonomous Agents
autonomous_agents.description: StudyAgents uses agentic patterns — tool use, planning, and multi-step reasoning for study assistance, document processing, and test generation.

unreal_engine.name: Unreal Engine
unreal_engine.description: Primary engine for game projects: Salmon Infinite (online multiplayer shooter), DROVO, Circus VR, and VR Experience. C++, Blueprints, networking, and 3D pipeline.

unity.name: Unity
unity.description: FIB Lab 2D game and prototyping. Experience with C#, 2D systems, and cross-platform builds.

blender.name: Blender
blender.description: 3D modeling, texturing, and animation for games and 3D printing. Character props, environment assets, and UV unwrapping.

photoshop.name: Photoshop
photoshop.description: Textures, UI assets, and promotional art for games and portfolio. Photo editing and 2D asset creation.

substance.name: Substance
substance.description: Substance Painter for PBR materials and texturing game assets. Realistic surfaces for characters and environments.

after_effects.name: After Effects
after_effects.description: Motion graphics and video editing for game trailers and portfolio presentations.

git.name: Git
git.description: Version control for all projects — branching, rebasing, and collaborative workflows. Essential for solo and team development.

jira.name: Jira
jira.description: Agile project management — sprints, backlogs, and issue tracking in team environments.

trello.name: Trello
trello.description: Task boards for personal and small-team project organization. Kanban-style workflow.

3d_printing.name: 3D Printing
3d_printing.description: FDM printing with UltiMaker Cura — large-scale models, support optimization, and post-processing. Adapted complex 3D models for printing.

proteus.name: Proteus
proteus.description: Microcontroller simulation for the Tire Inflator project. Circuit design and C programming for embedded systems.

computer_systems.name: Computer Systems
computer_systems.description: Understanding of operating systems, networking, and low-level concepts. Applied in game networking and systems programming.

iia10x.title: 10x Developer with Artificial Intelligence
iia10x.description: Intensive training in AI-powered development to multiply productivity using cutting-edge tools.

upcDegree.title: Bachelor's degree in Computer Engineering
upcDegree.description: Computer Engineering degree from FIB. I specialize in the Software Engineering track.

unityCourse.title: Unity Essential Course
unityCourse.description: Introduction to game development with Unity, taught by VGAFIB at FIB. Counts as 2 ECTS credits.

itbDiploma.title: Technological High-School Diploma
itbDiploma.description: Science and Technology baccalaureate with specific training in Python programming and digital technologies.
